changes.description: Party Plan was added as a restricted testing feature.
changes.details: A new Party Plan tab was added below Progression Planner for selected testers, with entry options to create a new group or join an existing shared group.

changes.description: Party Plan groups can be saved and reopened.
changes.details: Created or joined groups are remembered locally, so users can return to existing Party Plan groups without pasting the invite link again.

changes.description: Party Plan supports group members and whitelist friend search.
changes.details: Users can add friends from the Discord whitelist search, assign each member a color, and configure which local or test roster characters are included in the plan.

changes.description: Party Plan group configuration and raid board tabs were added.
changes.details: The feature now separates character/raid setup from the raid planning board, with compact roster character lists, selectable planned raids, and collapsible member runner lists.

changes.description: Party Plan raid assignments were added.
changes.details: Characters or whole members can be selected and assigned into raid lanes, with iLvl eligibility checks preventing characters from being added to raids they cannot enter.

changes.description: Static run connections were added to Party Plan.
changes.details: Assigned characters can be connected as planned static runs. Connections are limited to one character per member/roster and are shown with connection lines between adjacent character labels.

changes.description: Party Plan can sync through a Google Apps Script sheet backend.
changes.details: Party Plan data can be saved to and loaded from a shared Google Sheet through an Apps Script web app, including groups, members, characters, planned raids, assignments, completion snapshots, encounter snapshots, and raid config snapshots.

changes.description: Party Plan shares weekly completion snapshots.
changes.details: Each member can publish current-week completion_status data so other group members can see whether characters cleared a raid solo, publicly, or together.

changes.description: Party Plan shares encounter player snapshots.
changes.details: Recent encounters.db player lists are included in snapshots so shared raid clears can be detected even when another member's local LOA Logs tracking missed the run.

changes.description: Party Plan shares planned raid difficulties.
changes.details: Each member's local conf_raid difficulty settings are synced as raid config snapshots, including mixed gate setups, so other members can see planned difficulty information for friend characters.

changes.description: Party Plan UI was refined for dense group planning.
changes.details: Member lists, character labels, raid lanes, runner chips, and action buttons were tightened and restyled to match the app's quieter dashboard/settings controls.

changes.description: Party Plan labels now use member colors consistently.
changes.details: Runner and assigned character labels keep the color selected for their owner, making it easier to identify which member a character belongs to on the raid board.

changes.description: Party Plan supports wider planning layouts.
changes.details: The configuration and raid board sections can scroll horizontally when member or raid content needs more room, instead of compressing labels too aggressively.

changes.description: Party Plan feedback now uses toast messages.
changes.details: Load, sync, assignment, warning, and error feedback now appears as bottom-right toast messages matching the System Settings style and disappears automatically.

changes.description: Party Plan raid board instructions were moved into the header.
changes.details: Left-click and right-click behavior is now shown with compact mouse icons in the raid board header, while character tooltips focus on owner and raid status information.

changes.description: Party Plan remote sync is less noisy.
changes.details: Background snapshot syncing now only posts to the sheet when local completion state changes, while full group configuration sync remains tied to explicit Load/Sync actions.

changes.description: Party Plan access is temporarily restricted.
changes.details: The new tab is limited to selected Discord IDs for testing. Other users see a restricted area message and Party Plan background work does not start for them.

changes.description: Party Plan endpoint configuration moved out of public frontend code.
changes.details: The Apps Script endpoint is now loaded from PARTY_PLAN_ENDPOINT_URL through the Tauri backend, matching the private build-secret pattern used for the Discord whitelist URL.

changes.description: Party Plan development docs are ignored by git.
changes.details: The docs folder was added to .gitignore because the Apps Script template is only used for development/setup reference.

changes.description: Party Plan group deletion clears sheet data.
changes.details: Deleting a group removes all rows for that group across the sheet-backed Party Plan tables, including raid config, completion, and encounter snapshot data.

changes.description: Leaving a Party Plan group cleans up member data.
changes.details: When a member leaves a shared group, their member row, characters, raid config snapshots, completion snapshots, and encounter snapshots are removed from the shared plan.

changes.description: Party Plan drag-and-drop was replaced with click assignment.
changes.details: The unreliable native drag-and-drop flow was removed. Users now select a member or character and click Assign selected here on a raid lane for predictable behavior.

changes.description: Party Plan friend removal controls no longer disrupt alignment.
changes.details: Friend remove buttons now sit above the color picker, keeping member color fields aligned between local and friend rows.
